![Young person wearing a VR headset in front of ancient ruins](https://dcx.studio/assets/hero-CLwM_v_8.jpg)
Digital Cultural eXperiences
# Immersive VR & AR
for heritage & education.
DCX crafts engaging 3D, VR and AR experiences that connect young people with their heritage across the Middle East and Africa.
[See our creations](https://dcx.studio/#creations)[About DCX](https://dcx.studio/#about)
## About Us
At DCX, we believe that promoting heritage among youth is crucial for building a strong, unified society. Our mission is to create engaging and interactive experiences that help young people reconnect with their heritage, foster their sense of identity and broaden their cultural perspective.
We leverage cutting-edge VR/AR technology to craft immersive experiences that capture the interest of young people. Working with experts in history, storytelling, and game design, we create memorable experiences tailored to cultural institutions and NGOs.
We're building a unique collection of VR/AR cultural and educational experiences that can be enjoyed in schools, museums, archaeological sites, or through mobile devices. Our goal is to enhance cultural exchange in the Middle East and Africa, connecting young people with their heritage through technology.
Come along with us on this journey.
![](https://dcx.studio/assets/heritage-phone-C1ox4eQo.png)
### Bringing Heritage to Life: 3D, VR, and AR Cultural and Educational Experiences.
At DCX, we bring your visions to life through immersive 3D, VR, and AR experiences. Customized to meet your unique project goals, target audience, and location needs, our team creates animated, interactive, and realistic historical or fictional experiences for a variety of use cases — from enhancing architectural and cultural heritage to promoting UNESCO world heritage sites, telling history through engaging stories for children, creating educational games, or imagining the future.
![](https://dcx.studio/assets/vr-audience-DJFusmbY.png)
### Engaging Audiences with Active Mediation.
We believe in the power of combining digital and human mediation to bring cultural content to life for diverse audiences. We offer active and mobile audience mediation services for our VR, AR, and 3D experiences — in-person workshops and on-site mediators, along with the necessary technical equipment, to bring our immersive experiences to life for schools and youth spaces. Content can be tailored to specific languages and information levels, ensuring a memorable and meaningful experience for all.
## Featured
![Culture & Tech Club](https://dcx.studio/assets/culture-tech-club-DtfA2m3Z.jpg)
### Culture & Tech Club
Located in over 20 schools, the Culture & Tech Club offers a unique learning and fun space for young people to flourish, expand their knowledge, and prepare for tomorrow's world. Designed for students ages 7 to 15, the club's rich program of digital and playful experiences provides a gateway to explore one's own heritage and cultures from around the world.
![Immersive Stories](https://dcx.studio/assets/immersive-stories-qk6ADNma.jpg)
### Immersive Stories
Since 2021, DCX and the French Institute of Tunisia have been bringing history to life through our roaming digital caravan, "Immersive Stories." This initiative offers a unique learning opportunity for young people, using virtual reality to spark their appetite for culture and history. With stops in all 24 governorates of Tunisia, it is a must-visit for anyone looking to deepen their understanding of this vibrant country.
![Culture Digitale](https://dcx.studio/assets/culture-digitale-CNeYs0NH.jpg)
### Culture Digitale
Culture Digitale is an online platform dedicated to honoring our heritage, fostering creative arts, and embracing technological advancements.
